mesBoutiques.title: My stores
mesBoutiques.subtitle: Welcome {{ nom }} - manage your stores and your teams.
mesBoutiques.emptyTitle: No store has been assigned to you yet.
mesBoutiques.emptyHint: Contact your ADM manager to get an operating contract.
mesBoutiques.teamEmpty: No manager or salesperson assigned to this store.
mesBoutiques.existingHint: The user account must already exist. Enter the exact login.
mesBoutiques.newAccountHint: A new account will be created and an activation email will be sent to the user.
mesBoutiques.statsOpenHint: Open the card to load statistics.
mesBoutiques.auditEmpty: No action recorded for this store.

errors.loadFailed: Unable to load your stores. Please try again.
errors.statsFailed: Unable to load statistics for this store.
errors.auditFailedForbidden: The audit for this store is not available with your current rights.
errors.auditFailed: Unable to load the audit for this store.
errors.missingLoginAndProfile: Please enter a user login and choose a profile.
errors.userNotFound: No user found with login "{{ login }}".
errors.addFailed: Error while adding. Check your rights.
errors.missingRequiredFields: Please enter at least the login, email and profile.
errors.createFailed: Error while creating the account. Check your rights.
